original_question:
On a board, "COMPUTATION" is spelled out with 11 tiles, one letter per tile. Three vowels and four consonants fall off and are put away in a bag. If the Ts are indistinguishable, how many distinct possible collections of letters could be put in the bag?

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
